query:
UPDATE games SET
  -- Model scores
  modelAwayScore = 3.70,
  modelHomeScore = 3.85,
  -- Model moneyline (no-vig, rounded to whole numbers)
  modelAwayML = '+110',
  modelHomeML = '-110',
  -- Model win probabilities
  modelAwayWinPct = 47.72,
  modelHomeWinPct = 52.28,
  -- Model spread odds (away is favored on run line: PIT -1.5)
  -- awayBookSpread = -1.5 (PIT), homeBookSpread = +1.5 (NYM)
  -- Engine: away RL odds = -184, home RL odds = +184
  modelAwaySpreadOdds = '-184',
  modelHomeSpreadOdds = '+184',
  -- Run line (book spread columns already set, but also populate run line fields)
  awayRunLine = '-1.5',
  homeRunLine = '+1.5',
  awayRunLineOdds = '-184',
  homeRunLineOdds = '+184',
  -- Model total
  modelTotal = 7.0,
  modelOverRate = 45.30,
  modelUnderRate = 44.00,
  -- Model over/under odds
  modelOverOdds = '+121',
  modelUnderOdds = '+127',
  -- Edge fields
  spreadEdge = 'NO EDGE',
  spreadDiff = 0.0,
  totalEdge = 'NO EDGE',
  totalDiff = 0.0,
  -- Published
  publishedModel = 1,
  modelRunAt = UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000
WHERE id = 2250007;
